title: iris pumila var. binata
intro: Iris pumila var. binata, also known as the dwarf crested iris or tassel hyacinth, is a type of flowering plant that is native to Europe and Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Iris pumila var. binata include its ability to reduce swelling and promote healing, as well as its potential to help regulate blood sugar levels. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and rhizomes are typically dried and used to make teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat a variety of health issues.
